title: sarcopodium verruciferum
intro: Sarcopodium verruciferum, also known as Devil's Claw, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Pedaliaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating pain and inflammation, due to the presence of iridoid glycosides, which have anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Devil's Claw include relief from arthritis, gout, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as improved digestive health. Herbal preparations of Sarcopodium verruciferum include capsules, tablets, and teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
